title: Denver Metro eTRAKiT Permit Scraper
description: Scrapes eTRAKiT permit portals for custom home builds and remodels.

baseUrl.title: Portal base URL
baseUrl.description: Base URL of the eTRAKiT instance. No trailing slash.

cityName.title: City name
cityName.description: Written into every output record as source_city.

filterKeyword.title: Filter keyword
filterKeyword.description: Only keep permits where ANY field contains this word. Case-insensitive. Examples: REMODEL, ADDITION, NEW SINGLE FAMILY, ADU. Leave blank to return all permits.

daysBack.title: Days back
daysBack.description: How many days back to look for issued permits.

minValuation.title: Minimum valuation ($)
minValuation.description: Skip permits below this value. Set to 0 to disable.

maxPages.title: Max result pages
maxPages.description: Max pages to scrape. Set to 0 for unlimited.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Leave as default for most runs.
